title: phyllanthus epiphyllanthus subsp. domingensis
intro: Phyllanthus epiphyllanthus subsp. domingensis, also known as the Dominican Phyllanthus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including liver and kidney problems, as well as to lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Phyllanthus epiphyllanthus subsp. domingensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
